Title: "Bestie" Teaser Video from BAND-MAID Billboard Acoustic Tour TOKYO (April 13, 2025)
MESSAGE FROM KANAMI ⑥
Translation:
I’m Kanami, the guitarist.

Today I’d like to introduce Misa.

Misa drinks whiskey on stage so you might think she is so cool and stylish, but actually she usually does funny things to me and she acts sweet when she gets drunk, so she’s cute and I like her.

When I send her a song, she immediately sends me a bass line, so she’s quick at work and my best partner of composition.

That’s all.

Title: MESSAGE FROM MIKU ⑥
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po.

Now, I introduce Misa this time, po.

Misa-chan is just cute, po!

She’s very shy, and she has soft baby-like cheeks, po.

She keeps laughing when something strikes her sense of humor, po.

She’s a really pure girl, po.

We members sometimes watch over her as if we were her parents, po.

Misa loves drinking and I love her, po.

Well, bye-bye kuruppo!

Title: KANAMI④【MAID'S ROOM】
Translation:
00:00 How are you? I’m Kanami, the guitarist.

00:03 Well, I was thinking a lot about what to do today while seeing my phone, and I found quite a lot of memorable pictures there, so today I’d like to look back on memories together by looking at pictures I’ve picked up.

00:24 First, look at this one. It’s a picture taken on June 28, 2018. It’s June 25 today [note: the day she recorded the video], and, well, two years ago, we went to Mexico. We went there to do a serving.

00:43 When we went to Mexico for the first time, there was no non-stop flight, so we had to transit somewhere, in some other country, and then flew to Mexico, so I remember it took quite a long time.

01:03 But it seems non-stop flights to Mexico began operating from around that time, and you arrive in Mexico just by taking a flight for 14 or 15 hours, so I remember I was very impressed.

01:21 That said, it’s physically demanding to take a flight for 14 or 15 hours, so we members stretch seriously together. We always go abroad with preparation, like adjusting the time to go to bed beforehand and other things so that we can sleep tight on the flight.

01:48 Let’s get back to the picture. It’s a picture when we recorded a TV program in Mexico. Actually, we were surprised at first to be able to appear on a Mexican TV program, but I was very glad to have a rare… quite a rare experience in my life.

02:11 Also, the hotel in Mexico had a pool, so me, Ah-chan and Sai-chan went there and played there in swimsuits. I remember it was so much fun. [Note: she might be confusing it with Singapore.]

02:27 Now, let’s move on to the next, the next is a picture taken on July 7, 2018. That was when we went to Malaysia.

02:39 Well, it was when we joined a J-pop culture event, thankfully.

02:44 We went to Malaysia for the first time, and when we arrived there and went out of the airport, we were very surprised like “Whoa, it’s so hot!”, but we were pretty active while getting sweaty (laughs), and it wasn’t the kind of sweat that makes you feel bad but it was like sweating during exercise, so it was OK, and we were going out while thinking “It’s really hot!” [Note: The dry season of Southeast Asia is very comfortable for those from the hot and humid Japan.]

03:13 So we were going out while thinking “It’s so hot!”, but anyway, the food there was so delicious!

03:22 This one, in the picture you are seeing, we are having lobster, probably? The lobster was so plump and delicious all of us ordered a lot without hesitation (laughs).

03:33 We ate a lot, and there was also coconut rice and other dishes, and something like curry was pretty spicy and went along extremely well with the coconut rice, so all the dishes served were so delicious we got to know Malaysian cuisine is delicious.

03:54 Well, in the picture, you can see Koba-san and Sai-chan with me, but next to me Misa and Ah-chan were also there, so all of us were eating together.

04:08 Um, basically, not only abroad but also in Japan, I go to eat with my bandmates quite often, and, after all, I always think I’m lucky because they are all very nice.

04:23 They are like friends and like family members for me, so I can be truly myself, and I can purely enjoy… we can enjoy together, so I always think they are very nice and I’m lucky.

04:39 My bandmates! Thank you all the time!

04:43 Now, let’s move on to the next picture. Do any of you know this? I posted a somewhat similar picture on Twitter or Instagram or something. It’s a picture of Ah-chan and Sai-chan making something.

05:00 They did it every night for us, and I took pictures of them while lying on the bed like this, and watched over them.

05:13 Do any of you know what it’s about? The answer is this!

05:18 This is a picture of the serving at Okayama on September 24 [note: 2018]. Okayama is Misa’s hometown. [Note: Misa moved to Tokyo in her early teens.] It’s her hometown, and it’s famous for Momotarō, so we all played… Momotarō there (laughs). [Note: a Japanese folklore in which Momotarō, with the help of a dog, a monkey, and a pheasant, defeats ogres.]

05:44 Many of you might wonder “what on earth is it?” but, well, on the tour at that time, we members planned surprise acts, and we tried to entertain audience in various ways such as little surprise acts related to each location during the MC time.

06:10 Ah-chan, this monkey, loves surprise acts and local things so much she thought of surprise acts related to each location and prepared them for us.

06:27 I have a lot of really fun memories for each moment.

06:33 That said, umm, we probably won’t do these things anymore, so masters and princesses coming home at that time had a rare experience.

06:45 Well, we Band-Maid members really love to act silly, or to do a little silly things.

06:56 However, my bandmates are actually all sincere, and serious about music.

07:03 I’m really happy to be surrounded by the fantastic bandmates who are sincere, hardworking, cheerful, kind, and caring, but a little silly and funny, and to perform together.

07:20 My bandmates! Thank you all the time!!!!

07:25 All right. So, let’s stop here for today.

07:29 How was today’s one? I mean Mincho’s Room where we look back on memories together. If it was fun, please tell me “it was fun!” on Twitter or something. If it wasn’t fun, please tell me “it wasn’t fun!” In that case I’ll do other things. If it was good, I’ll probably do it again.

07:54 Now, it’s about time. That’s all.

Title: MESSAGE FROM MIKU ⑤
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po!

This is my last introduction of my bandmates, and it’s about Akane, po! [Note: Miku probably recorded five messages at once and she didn’t know her introduction of Misa would be the last.]

Ah-chan is the most sociable member among us, po.

I think she has the most number of friends, po.

She’s cheerful, and she eats natto on rice all the time, po.

She’s sometimes a little silly, po, and I get worried when she can’t recite the multiplication table well, po, but she’s always so powerful I’m amazed at her, po.

Moreover, Ah-chan’s funny face is literally funny, po!

That’s all from Kobato, po. Bye-bye, po!

Title: MESSAGE FROM MISA ⑤
Translation:
Hello, I’m Misa.

Everyone, how are you? I’m fine.

This time I’ll introduce Akane, our drummer, and personally, basically, I can’t relax around other people, but strangely I can relax when I’m with Akane.

I think that’s because of Akane’s own character.

Yeah, I’m really relaxed when I’m with her.

She’s on the same wavelength of silly jokes with me, and she’s a fun and kind girl.

Akane, let’s stay the best rhythm section together.

Bye. That’s all from Misa.

Title: MESSAGE FROM KANAMI ⑤
Translation:
I’m Kanami, the guitarist. Today I’d like to introduce Ah-chan.

Ah-chan is the member I’ve been with for the longest time in our band, for almost 10 years, probably? [Note: They probably met in early 2011.]

She’s the life of the party in our band, and she always makes us laugh.

And she has such a pure heart she has an ability to open many other people’s heart quickly.

She practices the drums really a lot every day, which is cool. She’s the pillar of the band.

That’s all.

Title: SAIKI④【MAID'S ROOM】
Translation:
O-mei-syu-sama! I’m Saiki.

Now, I’d like to introduce sneakers also this time, without getting bored.

First, let me show you the box.

This is the box.

It’s black. Do you know this “Nike On Air”?

This Nike On Air is the name of a design contest by Nike to create new Air Max in six cities in the world, and Tokyo was included in Nike On Air, like “Japan, Tokyo”, and this is the pair of sneakers they chose there.

Here they are.

They’re very eccentric, right?

Well, this design, something like a maze, was created based on an image of the Tokyo subway, and, um, this red design on the back, and this red in the inside, and the red letters on the soles stand for the red color of Tokyo Tower, so I’ve heard.

And the left is accented with black lines on a white background, and this one, the right, is accented with white lines on a black background.

The name of the sneakers is Tokyo Maze. It’s written on the soles. “TOKYO MAZE”. It’s cool, right?

And their characteristics are these many things, including shoelaces.

Here, look here, this one is removable with Velcro like this, so you can use, here, which should I use… this one with the name, which looks nice, like this, and you can play with them by customizing them.

These ones, I couldn’t buy them in real time, and you know, there are a lot of sneaker lovers out there, there are so many I often become friends with them like “Oh do you love sneakers?” and one of those friends kindly sold them to me.

They are a couple and the husband said he had bought these sneakers for his wife.

But the wife didn’t like the design and didn’t think they would suit her, and when we talked about that he kindly said he could sell them to me.

I’ve talked about these cute sneakers.

See you next time. Bye-bye!

Title: MESSAGE FROM SAIKI ⑤
Translation: I’d like to introduce Ah-chan.\r\n\r\nAh-chan is, how should I say… quite hungry for laughter, and she’s such a kind woman she entertains people, and, um, she makes people happy, and she doesn’t forget to plan surprise parties, and so on, and she’s such a kind woman she goofs around with me, Sai-chan.

Title: MESSAGE FROM SAIKI ④
Translation:
O-mei-syu-sama, I’m Saiki.

I’ll introduce Kanami-chan.

Kanami-chan doesn’t show me a funny face; she believes whatever I say randomly; she’s funny and cute; she sometimes can’t speak Japanese well; and she’s glad when I feed her whipped cream.

That’s all.

Title: MESSAGE FROM KANAMI ④
Translation:
I’m Kanami, the guitarist.

All of them are going to introduce me, so I’m nervous.

What should I do? I wonder if they say something funny about me (laughs).

But they are all so kind that they must be going to do a fantastic introduction of me.

By the way, as for me, I love all of my bandmates!

That’s all from Kanamincho.

Title: 小鳩ミク④【MAID'S ROOM】
Translation:
Translation

Welcome back home, o-mei-syu-sama! Kuruppo!

This is the fourth episode of Kobato’s Room, po!

We, Kobato and Torao, are bringing this program to you again, po! Kuruppo!

Well, this time, in the fourth episode, I’ll introduce you these films, po!

The End, a 2007 Hungarian film, and Amour, this is, po, a 2012 drama film, um, co-produced by Australia [note: actually Austria], France, and Germany, po.

Clap clap clap clap clap.

The two films I’ll talk about this time are a little heavy stories, po.

When I, Kobato, saw them… both of them, I cried too much and that was insane, po.

My eyes were all swollen, po.

Well, both of them are stories about an elderly couple, po.

They are two movies that make you think about love when you live a long life, po.

First, The End is a 2007 Hungarian film, and in this film, po, an elderly couple faces a pension problem, and, um, that makes their life hard, po.

So, in order to recover from the hardship of life, surprisingly, the couple becomes robbery… robbers, po. They commit robbery, po.

And, um, they keep committing robbery, but, how should I say, the husband is gentlemanlike, and the couple are two very noble, or rather good-natured people, so the film is quite heartwarming, and it makes you feel warm inside, po.

It’s a painful and sad but somewhat heartwarming movie, po.

Its ending is quite shocking, but it would be a spoiler for all of you who are going to see it if I talk about it, so you won’t forget it once you see it, po. It’s a shocking movie, so everyone, please see it once, po.

And the other one. Amour is a film, a drama film, co-produced by Australia [note: actually Austria], France, and Germany, po.

This film is also quite heavy, po (laughs). Um, it’s a story about elderly people, about nursing care of an elderly couple, po, and, you know, nursing care is not easy after all, po, so the film made me think about what I would do if I become like that and if things go like that, po.

Well, the film goes at quite a slow tempo, but you won’t get bored, so I want you to see it slowly with a calm heart, po.

The two films make your heart quite heavy and make you think, so I think you probably won’t forget them once you see them, po.

Masters and princesses and o-mei-syu-sama, how about taking a look at them once, po?

However, I should say one thing: please prepare one whole box of tissues, po (laughs).

I, Kobato, am easily moved to tears, po. I see a movie and cry like “waaah” at home, po. Well, I cried particularly for those two films, so everyone, please cry like “waaah” together, po.

[Note: to Tora] Do you cry like “meow meow”? (laughs)

Everyone, please tell me your favorite films, or the films you recommend to me, po.

Now, it’s about time, that’s all from Tora and Kobato, po!

See you, po! Bye-bye, po! Bye… [note: Tora bites Miku’s hand] ouch, it hurts, po.

Title: MESSAGE FROM SAIKI③
Translation:
O-mei-syu-sama, I’m Saiki.

I’ve heard my bandmates are introducing me Sai-chan this time, but I don’t know what they say about me, so my heart is racing.

I wonder… Are they talking about my shyness with strangers or what I’m like when I’m drinking, probably?

I’m looking forward to listening.

Title: MISA④【MAID'S ROOM】
Translation:
00:00 Everyone, hello. I’m Misa.

00:02 Well, today, I’d like to briefly explain my techniques of picking to slapping and slapping to picking I often use while I play. Please listen.

00:15 First, this is my pick. I haven’t explained so much about my pick, so I explain it here. My pick is a little bigger than ordinary picks, a little, a little bit bigger.

00:34 In addition, it’s not so hard. It has a hardness between the green and the yellow Dunlop picks you often see at instrument stores.

00:48 Well, I’d like to explain simply first, so I’ll do it while showing the pick.

00:55 First, I’m holding the pick like this.

00:59 Like this? Can you see this better?

01:02 I’m holding it like this.

01:05 I’m playing.

01:08 Now I hold it here.

01:12 From here like this to here.

01:23 So, give it a try.

01:25 Now, I’d like to actually play the bass.

01:30 It’s a repetition like this.

01:39 So, first, I’d like to play the bass slowly to the A-melody of Bubble.

02:04 A phrase like that.

02:06 Can you see it?

02:08 Since Bubble has a slow tempo, I think it’s easy to practice.

02:14 Now, I’ll do it while playing the song.

02:36 Like that.

02:39 By the way, without holding it here, you can play it only by pulling.

02:46 For example…

02:54 Like that. While holding it here, I pull with my middle finger.

03:07 You can do it like that.

03:10 Well, next, I’ll show you Wonderland whose tempo is similar to Bubble.

03:18 I’ll play to the song. I’ll play the A-melody.

04:01 Well, like that.

04:04 If I play it slowly…

04:16 Like that.

04:27 In this floating moment, I’m holding it here.

04:32 Well, so, today, this time, that’s all. Next time, it’ll be nice if I can do an Instagram Live somewhere together.

04:42 Let’s keep practicing this together.

04:46 See you again somewhere. Bye-bye!

Title: AKANE③【MAID'S ROOM】
Translation:
O-mei-syu-sama, hello. I’m Akane.

This time I’ll do the second half of the introduction of my favorite figures.

Well, this time I’d like to go on quickly not to go over the recording time. Let’s get started!

Last time I had several figures still in boxes, and actually I have one more box. This is the one.

Ta-da! Many of you probably know Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. This is Zenitsu Agatsuma of Demon Slayer.

Zenitsu is my favorite character.

So, I’d like to unbox this.

Yeah, it’s unboxed. Oh! I see! It needs assembly. OK, I’ll assemble it now!

“Thunder Breathing First Form, Thunderclap and Flash!” Shoo shoo shoo shoo shoo! That’s a famous schene, you know.

Zenitsu is a wimp and crybaby usually, but he’s actually a cool boy who stands up when he should.

He’s a very good boy who is kind and caring.

He’s my favorite character.

Now, the next one is my precious kid who made me start collecting figures.

Ta-da! She’s Shinobu Oshino-chan of Bakemonogatari.

When I saw this figure, well, how should I say, I got completely addicted to the charm of figures. This face of hers is cute. Shinobu-chan has a really cute face.

This one made me addicted to figures. I got this figure of Shinobu-chan as the Last One Prize of Koyomi No Shifuku No Toki, Ichiban Kuji Premium of celebrating the fifth anniversary of Bakemonogatari.

The Last One Prize is what you get if you draw the last one on Ichiban Kuji.

I really really wanted this girl but I couldn’t get her on Ichiban Kuji, and I looked for her all around figure shops in Akihabara but I couldn’t find her. I finally got her after a lof efforts, so she’s precious.

She’s very precious because she’s the first kid among my figures.

So, the next one is also a figure of Shinobu-chan. I have a precious memory also on this girl, so I’d like to introduce her.

Ta-da! She’s cute, right? She’s too cute. Look at this doughnut. Yes, this is a doughnut. Shinobu-chan loves doughnuts.

This was also from Ichiban Kuji. She’s Shinobu-chan of the B Prize, the B Prize chocolate version of Oyatsu Time on Ichiban Kuji.

This was my birthday present from the staff members of Band-Maid’s home venue named Shibuya Eggman, who tried hard on Ichiban Kuji together and won it!

We performed at Eggman then, and when we were about to leave after finishing our serving, to my surprise the staff members said they had a present for me. They were like “What do you think it is? You’ll be happy!” I didn’t have any idea at all and I was like “What? What is it?” and I thought they would probably give me some joke item, but to my surprise they gave me this girl, and I was so glad I was down to my knees and almost cried. I was really happy.

I’d like to thank the warmhearted staff members of Eggman. This girl really brings back my precious memory. She’s also incredibly cute.

Here is another Shinobu-chan.

This is Shinobu-chan sitting on the chair.

Her facial expression is cute too. She’s really fantastic.

I also have small figures of Shinobu-chan. I love figures of Shinobu-chan best, but actually I have only these three figures, I mean, when it comes to large ones. That’s because Shinobu-chan is an extremely popular character and immediately gets sold out.

There was an exhibition named MADOGATARI Exhibition where the anime Puella Magi Madoka Magica and Bakemonogatari collaborated before, and they sold a figure of Shinobu-chan hugging Kyubey of Madoka Magica and a figure of Shinobu-chan wearing the clothes, I mean the costume, of Mami-san of Madoka Magica, but they got sold out in a moment. I couldn’t get any. They are popular like that, so I can hardly get them. So I’d like to collect one by one steadily on Ichiban Kuji.

So, I’ve introduced you all of my favorite figures! Yes, they are all fantastic.

I love them all, including Asuka. Everyone, please spend your happiest time at home seeing your favorite things.

I’ve divided this long video into the first half and the second half, so it might be too long, but thank you so much for watching it to the end!

That’s all from Akane. See you later!

Title: MESSAGE FROM MIKU ④
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Miku Kobato, po!

This time I’ll introduce Kanami-chan, po.

Mincho is a little weird girl even though she doesn’t know it herself, po.

She sometimes awakens in servings and surprises everyone, po.

She’s usually soft and dreamy, but in our rehearsals and dress rehearsals she controls tightly, so we can go on smoothly as scheduled thanks to her, po. Thanks, po.

Mincho likes coffee and we often go and drink coffee together, and she loves green and Coji-Coji.

She’s so lovely I love her, po!

Now, it’s about time, bye-bye, po!

Title: #voice_bandmaid  SAIKI②
Translation:
This time too, I’d like to answer one of the questions you sent.

“If the five of you cosplay as Sailor Moon characters, what combination will that be?”

So, in my personal opinion,

Kobato is Sailor Chibi Moon,

Misa-chan is Sailor Pluto,

Ah-chan is Sailor Jupiter,

Kanami-chan is Sailor Neptune,

and me, Sai-chan, will choose Sailor Mars.

Title: #voice_bandmaid  KANAMI②
Translation:
I’m Kanami, the guitarist.

I’m answering today’s question.

Well, from Kuruppo MAID IN NAGOYA-san.

“I’d like to know which guitarist and which band you have been influenced by other than Santana. And where do your guitar riffs and sound ideas come from?”

Um, there are so many guitarists and bands I’ve been influenced by, I wouldn’t be able to name them within 30 seconds. As for ideas, I put importance on inputs and outputs.

I listen to various artists while analyzing them in my own way, and I keep on writing a lot of guitar riffs as outputs like a riff making machine.

I will continue to improve myself, so please support me.

Thank you for your question.

Title: MESSAGE FROM AKANE ②
Translation:
O-mei-syu-sama, hello. I’m Akane.

Today, I introduce Kobato.

Kobato is a man among men, exactly like the Kyushu man. [Note: Japanese people have a stereotype for Kyushu men to be manly, like Texas men in the US. Miku is from Kumamoto in Kyushu.]

And her words and her actions are all so handsome!

She could appear as a man in shojo manga [note: romantic manga for girls].

In addition, she takes her selfies with my iPhone whenever possible.

When I open my data folder, I’m surprised to find it’s full of her faces.

She is a mischievous and handsome pigeon.

Please support Kobato, po!

That’s all from Akane.

Title: MESSAGE FROM KANAMI ①
Translation:
Masters and princesses, how are you? I’m Kanami, the guitarist.

I spend days of practice and songwriting at home.

I always keep snacks with me while writing songs, but a while ago I ran out all the snacks in my house.

And Mincho thought to herself, “if you don’t have a snack, you can make your own.”

So, I made madeleines for the first time in a few years. They tasted so good!

Happy ever after.

See you later.

Title: MESSAGE FROM MIKU ①
Translation:
Kuruppo! O-mei-syu-sama, I’m Miku Kobato, po. Everyone, how are you doing lately, po?

Every day at home, I play the guitar, play with my affectionate Tora, make meals, po.

And I do myofascial release, play PUBG, and so on. I somehow enjoy my home life.

It’s still a tough time now, but let’s stay safe, stay home and work hard at it.

Bye-bye, po!

Title: MESSAGE FROM MISA ①
Translation:
Hello. It’s been a while. I’m Misa. How have you been?

Because of this situation, well, I spend time by increasing practicing time at home.

I try to change my playing form and check it, um, and I practice phrases I’m not good at yet, and so on.

Um, I don’t drink from daytime, and I live quite a healthy life.

Everyone, take care of yourself, and let’s get through it together.

Bye. That’s all from Misa.

Title: MESSAGE FROM SAIKI ①
Translation:
O-mei-syu-sama, hi, I’m Saiki.

I do what I can do to improve myself at home these days.

I continue body training because I love it, but I also try my best to train my sense of tone to sing better, using a keyboard.

Now we are having a very tough time, but we must work hard at it together, right?

Let’s do our best so that we can meet at the serving safely.

See you.

Title: MESSAGE FROM AKANE ①
Translation:
Masters and princesses! Yoo-hoo! I’m Akane. How do you spend time at home now?

I spend time at home by doing strengthening training of basics every day, in a way I can do at home using hand and foot practicing pads.

In addition, I do workout and stretching with a Switch game called Ring Fit Adventure.

It’s as effective as going to a gym, so I try my best to keep doing it every day!

I will update you again. Let’s work hard at it together! That’s all from Akane.

Bye-bye!

Translation:

00:06 Akane: Yeah.

00:09 Akane: That’s nice.

00:13 Akane: Nice.

00:14 Akane: Please look at me.

00:16 Saiki: Hmm?

00:17 Akane: That’s nice.

00:20 Akane: Please smile a little.

00:23 Saiki: Smile (laughs).

00:24 Akane: (laughs)

00:26 Saiki: I can’t smile.

00:30 Akane: You’re cute.

00:31 Akane: You’re cute.

00:34 Akane: Please take your eyes off.

00:35 Saiki: Hmm?

00:36 Akane: Oh, that’s nice.

00:38 Kanami: It was fun! [Note: She seems to finish reading something.]

00:41 Saiki: (laughs) Do you want to say anything about something?

00:43 Akane: Nice, your natural smile.

00:45 Kobato: “It was fun.” [Note: Kobato imitates Kanami.]

00:46 Kanami: (laughs) Right.

00:48 Akane: Oh, that’s nice.

00:49 Saiki: Hmm?

00:52 Akane: Tilt like “Hmm?”

00:54 Saiki: Hmm?

00:54 Akane: Oh! You’re cute!

00:56 Saiki: (laughs)

00:59 Kanami: Are you crying?

00:59 Saiki: I can’t (laughs). [Note: “I can’t do such a cute thing.”]

01:00 Akane: You’re cute!

01:02 Saiki: I can’t.

01:04 Saiki: I can’t.

01:05 Akane: Hmm? What’s wrong?

01:07 Kanami: Studio Alice? [Note: a famous Japanese photo studio chain.]

01:08 Akane: Studio Alice!

01:10 Kanami: (laughs)

01:10 Akane: Oh, you’re cute!

01:11 Saiki: (laughs)

01:12 Akane: It’s like shichi-go-san! [Note: Japanese people often take pictures of their children at a photo studio for shichi-go-san.]

Title: MISA's  NEW BASS!!
Translation:
00:00 Misa: This is my new bass.

00:02 Misa: An SG-shaped 5-string P-bass.

00:19 Misa: Now I distort it.

00:56 Misa: (laughs)

00:58 Misa: This is phasing.

00:59 Misa: A phaser.

01:06 Misa: Thanks. Thank you for your support! (laughs)

Title: 輪廻 Making Movie
Translation:
Scene 1

00:23 [Caption] On standby

00:31 Kobato: Do you always arrange flowers?

00:34 Staff: Oh, it fit in well.

Scene 2

00:35 [Caption] Filming a performance scene

Scene 3

00:44 [Caption] (Kanami is having a massage)

00:45 Saiki: Awesome! Your facial expression is back.

00:48 Akane: Your eyes are opening (laughs).

00:49 Saiki: Your eyes are opening.

00:51 Kanami: Wooow!!

00:54 Kanami: Good morning.

00:56 Akane: “Good morning” (laughs).

01:01 Staff: Your eyes are gradually opening!

01:04 Kanami: Aahh!

01:06 Kanami: My blood began to circulate!

01:08 Kanami: Great!

01:11 Kanami: You are as good as chiropractors!

01:13 Saiki: Really? Awesome!

01:18 Kanami: Thank you very much, sensei.

01:23 Akane: It’s coming. Sai-chan, your eyes will open.

01:27 Saiki: Will my eyes open too?

01:29 Saiki: Oh! You’re good! (laugher) Awesome!

01:32 Kanami: Isn’t she different from her first touch?

01:34 Akane: “Her first touch” (laughs).

01:37 Saiki: Awesome!

01:38 Saiki: Why are you this strong?

01:44 Kanami: How do you do it with your slim figure?

Scene 4

01:49 [Caption] (Kanami is improvising a song)

01:52 Saiki: [Singing] Snacks, I want snacks…

01:56 Saiki: You made it intense (laughs).

02:10 Kanami: [Singing] Saiki wants to eat snacks.

02:14 Kanami: [Singing] She wants to eat snacks.

02:17 Saiki: (laughs) What high tones!

02:22 Kanami: [Singing] She gets Sapporo Potato.

02:25 Saiki: BBQ taste.

02:27 Kanami: [Singing] BBQ taste.

02:30 Kanami: Thanks!

02:33 Saiki: We’ve written a song.

02:36 Misa: A song about snacks (laughs).

02:37 Saiki: Snacks (laughs) … we’ve written a song of “I want to eat snacks”.

Scene 5

02:39 [Caption] (Filming a solo performance scene)

02:39 Staff: Sound please.

02:41 Staff: It’s coming out.

Scene 6

03:03 Kanami: O… o… o… over, it’s over!

03:08 Saiki: O, o, o.

03:10 Kobato: O, o, o, o, o.

03:13 Kobato: Po, po, po, po.

03:15 Kobato: Po, po, po, po, po, po, po, po, po.

03:17 Akane: Hey, it’s over!

03:20 Akane: Finally I can have a meal!

03:23 Saiki: You’re too easy to please (laughs).

03:25 Saiki: What was your performance scene like?

03:27 Akane: Well, isn’t it the most intense ever?

03:30 Saiki: The song too.

03:31 Akane: Yeah, the song too.

03:33 Akane: It’s probably the first time I kicked the double pedal this hard.

03:37 Saiki: In a music video?

03:38 Akane: Yeah, in a music video.

03:39 Saiki: It’s the first filming.

03:40 Akane: Yeah.

03:40 Saiki: Wow.

03:41 Akane: Yeah.

03:42 Akane: Have high expectations.

03:44 Saiki: “Have high expectations” (laughs).

03:45 Akane: Have high expectations.

03:46 Saiki: Don’t you say “Please don’t miss it”? (laughs)

03:47 Akane: Have high expectations.

Scene 7

03:50 Saiki: Kanami-san.

03:52 Saiki: Kanami-san, Misa-san, you have finished.

03:54 Kanami: Yes, thank you very much for today!

03:57 Saiki: What kind of music video is it?

03:59 Kanami: Today, well, I, Mincho, was very…

04:03 Saiki: It’s our first time using 8mm film.

04:06 Kanami: Right, it was 8mm film, so I don’t know yet what kind of image it will be, but…

04:11 Saiki: You mean its completion.

04:12 Kanami: Yes. I don’t know what the completion will be like, but it will surely be a very cool MV.

04:17 Misa: It has such an awesome atmosphere.

04:19 Kanami: Yeah.

04:20 Misa: Also my chin.

04:20 Saiki: Atmosphere?

04:21 Misa: Yeah, atmosphere.

04:23 Kanami: Right, today, your chin was really awesome. Your chin had a good feel to it.

04:26 Saiki: Because of light, lighting. Oh, you can’t see it now.

04:30 Kanami: Hmm, it had a really good feel.

04:31 Saiki: No, you can’t see it.

04:33 Saiki: It was awesome when you played.

04:34 Kanami: Yeah, awesome.

04:36 Saiki: Please check it in the music video.

04:38 Misa: Please check it.

04:40 Kanami: It was a really good day today. Absolutely.

04:45 Kanami: Yes.

04:46 Misa: Yay!

04:46 Kanami: Bye-bye!

Scene 8

04:49 Saiki: We’ve finished. Thank you very much.

04:55 Saiki: I had long wanted to use 8mm film personally, and finally we used it for the music video of Rinne.

05:05 Saiki: I can’t see the completion yet, but I’m looking forward to it, and please don’t miss it.

05:15 Saiki: Please watch it many times. Bye-bye!

Scene 9

05:18 Kobato: This time, for the first time, we filmed in, how should I say, an abandoned building? and I’m often said I’m the type to be easily cursed (laughs) and they all said I should bring purifying salt with me here, so I’ve come here with determination and with a purifier, po (laughs).

05:38 Kobato: I think it will be a purified… purified? and cool video, so I’d like many masters and princesses to watch it, po!

05:48 Kobato: I, Kobato, headbanged so hard I’m afraid of having whiplash… having a stiff neck tomorrow, po (laughs).

05:56 Kobato: Po! It was like that, po! Please enjoy it, po!

Title: OMAJINAI TIME (MAGIC SPELL TIME) Oct 20, 2019
Translation:
00:01 Kobato: Mincho, I want you to sing it, po.

00:08 Kanami: Do I have to sing alone?

00:09 Kobato: No, you can sing it with everyone, po.

00:10 Kanami: OK, let’s sing together.

00:12 Kanami: Well then…

00:14 Kanami: Everyone, are you ready?!

00:18 Kanami: We go to battle now!

00:20 Kobato: Battle?! Do you go to battle, po? (laughs)

00:22 Kanami: Well, we will sing a song called “Happy Birthday” together.

00:29 Kanami: Here we go!

00:30 Kanami: Ready, go!

00:31 Kanami: [Singing] Happy birthday to you, Happy birthday to you, Happy birthday dear Koba…

00:48 Kanami: Ready, go!

00:49 Kanami: [Singing] Happy birthday to you.

00:55 Kobato: Po! Thank you, po!

00:58 Kanami: Kobato!

00:59 Kobato: Thanks, po!

01:02 Kanami: How old will you turn?

01:04 Kobato: Um, I, Kobato, will turn 810 years old, well, one, two, three, four, five… the sixth time, po.

01:13 Kanami: The sixth time?

01:14 Kobato: Yeah, this is my sixth time to turn 810 years old, po.

01:17 Kobato: Those of you new to this probably can’t get it, but, “You’re Hato, so you’re 810 years old”, Sai-chan told me so, po. [Note: “810” can be read “hato” (“pigeon”) in Japanese.]

01:26 Kobato: Since then, I’ve been repeating, repeating, and repeating 810 years old, po.

01:32 Kobato: So, this is my sixth time to turn 810 years old, po!

01:38 Kanami: They are all so kind!

01:39 Kobato: It’s nice they are all kind, po.

01:41 Kanami: There was so much, so loud voice.

01:43 Kobato: Right, I’m happy, po!

01:45 Kanami: Good for you!

01:45 Kobato: Yeah.

01:46 Kanami: Happy birthday.

01:47 Kobato: Thank you very much, po.

01:49 Kanami: So, please have fun celebrating Kobato-san.

Title: OMAJINAI TIME (MAGIC SPELL TIME) Oct 14, 2019
Translation:
00:00 Kobato: Can we start now, po? Everyone. Are you ready, po?

00:05 Kobato: Like “I’m a little embarrassed” or like “Nah, I won’t do such a thing”, those are not allowed, po!

00:12 Kobato: I, Kobato, won’t allow that, po.

00:14 Audience: Kobato, just bring it!

00:16 Kobato: Bring it on!

00:17 Kobato: Here we go, po! (laughs)

00:20 Kobato: Moe moe!

00:23 Kobato: Kyun kyun!

00:30 Kobato: Not bad, not bad, but, you know, I can see those of you upstairs don’t open your mouth so wide, po.

00:40 Kobato: Here we go, po.

00:42 Kobato: Hey, you! OK.

00:44 Kobato: Moe moe!

00:47 Kobato: Kyun kyun!

00:49 Kobato: Moe moe!

00:52 Kobato: Kyun kyun!

00:54 Kobato: Conqueror!

00:56 Kobato: Conqueror!

00:59 Kobato: Band-Maid!

01:01 Kobato: Band-Maid!

01:03 Kobato: Band-Maid!

01:06 Kobato: Band-Maid!

01:08 Kobato: Misa, Misa, Misa, say!

01:13 Kobato: Misa… (laughs)

01:18 Kobato: You know what, it was the same overseas, po.

01:20 Kobato: I get confused in the middle. When I say “Misa, Misa, Misa, say!”, they say up to “say!”, po.

01:24 Kobato: “Say!” is not included, po.

01:26 Kobato: You and me are Japanese, so I believe we can understand each other, po.

01:29 Kobato: Misa, Misa, Misa, say!

01:35 Kobato: Misa, Misa, Misa!

01:38 Kobato: Misa, Misa, Misa!

01:42 Kobato: Last! Misa, Misa, Misa!

01:48 Kobato: Zukkyun bakkyun dokkyun…

01:50 Kobato: [Singing] Happy birthday to you, Happy birthday to you, Happy birthday dear Misa, Happy birthday to you!

02:08 Kobato: Are you ready to have more fun, po?

02:15 Kobato: Let’s sing loud together, po! Rock in me!

今月の一曲　Song of the Month SAIKI (Feb., 2022)
Translation:
Hello, o-mei-syu-sama. I’m Saiki.

How are you?

Um, my “Song of the Month” is, um, About Us.

I thought it was extremely cold in February, so I chose the song that warms? your heart!

Please listen to it!

And I give you this picture of dried flowers I was making.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO (Feb., 2022)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po.

My “Song of the Month” is Alone, po.

Speaking of February, we had Valentine’s Day, po, didn’t we?

I buy myself Morozoff and Miffy’s collab chocolates every year, po, but this year so sadly I couldn’t buy one, so I baked cookies for myself for the first time in a while, po.

I bought a Miffy cookie cutter and drew the faces with an icing pen, but it was so hard to balance the eyes, po!

That made me want to try once again, po.

Bye-bye, po.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MISA (Feb., 2022)
Translation:
Hi, I’m Misa.

My “Song of the Month” is Awkward.

I listened to it for the first time in a while and thought it’s a good song, so I chose it.

Me, Kanami, and Sai-chan played it at the Christmas acoustic concert last year, right?

I already even feel nostalgic.

Time flies. It’s already February, right?

Cold days continue, but everyone, please take care of yourselves not to catch a cold.

One twelfth of this year has already passed. Time flies a little too fast.

Well then, everyone, bye-bye.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month AKANE (Feb., 2022)
Translation:
I’m Akane.

Speaking of February, there was a big event for girls, Valentine’s Day, right?

Did you all receive or give chocolates?

As for me, I bought myself chocolates and canelés.

I’ve been eating more sweets recently.

I remembered the chocolates and cakes I ate in the scene of Don’t you tell ME where I snitch them were extremely delicious, so I chose Don’t you tell ME for my “Song of the Month”!

See you!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month KANAMI (Feb., 2022)
Translation:
How are you? I’m Kanamincho.

February was Sai-chan’s birth month, wasn’t it?

Thank you for being born!

Thank you for doing the band with me.

Saiki-sensei also writes lyrics these days, doesn’t she?

Everyone, this month, let’s listen together to the song Saiki-sensei wrote lyrics to.

So, my “Song of the Month” is Corallium.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month KANAMI (Jan., 2022)
Translation:
How are you? I’m Kanami.

I hope the world where we can sing along together will finally come back this year, so I’ve chosen Endless Story for my “Song of the Month”.

This is a picture of a mochi that was left on New Year’s Day and I ate with butter, soy sauce, and nori.

How do you all like to eat mochi?

Well, see you!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO (Jan., 2022)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po.

For my “Song of the Month”, I’ve chosen a song that would make you hot against cold weather, Hibana, po.

This is a picture of nimono of daikon, a dish I always want to make in a cold night.

I, Kobato, boil ume plums together and eat them.

If you have an upset stomach, eating it will make you feel better, po.

Well then, everyone, let’s keep going even under the cold weather, po!

Bye-bye kuruppo!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month SAIKI (Jan., 2022)
Translation:
Hello, o-mei-syu-sama. I’m Saiki.

How are you?

Um, my “Song of the Month” is Anemone.

The reason is because I’ve been listening to it a lot lately.

Everyone, please give it a listen.

Um, this is totally unrelated, but I, Sai-chan, have been growing hyacinths recently, so please take a look at the picture.

See you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MISA (Jan., 2022)
Translation:
Hi, I’m Misa.

My “Song of the Month” is Play.

I’ve been watching live videos on YouTube recently, and that made me want to play Play in front of you all as soon as possible.

We’ve played a lot of arrangements in the intro of Play, right?

How many arrangements are there actually? I don’t remember.

Please someone tell me.

This is a picture of an ozoni I ate on New Year’s Day.

Well then, see you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month AKANE (Jan., 2022)
Translation:
Hi, I’m Akane.

My “Song of the Month” is Dilemma.

We’ve had really a lot of problems, like we want to do servings with you masters and princesses but there are pretty difficult issues, and the five of us want to gather and hang out together but we can’t, but I hope we will blow away those dilemmas this year, which is why I have selected this song.

Thank you for supporting us Band-Maid in 2022.

Let’s have a fun year!

That’s all from Akane. Bye-bye!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO (Dec., 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po.

Spring, summer, fall, winter, and when I realized, it’s already December, and in the last month of the year, I’ve chosen Rinne for my “Song of the Month”.

I’d like to play this song while headbanging with you all at in-person servings next year for sure, po.

This is a beautifully shot picture of me riding a horse, po.

Let’s overcome the cold winter together toward spring, po!

Well then, bye-bye kuruppo!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MISA (Dec., 2021)
Translation:
Hi, I’m Misa.

This time, I choose Corallium for my “Song of the Month”.

I’ve been listening to only this song recently, and I think its sound making is nice, if I say so myself.

Everyone, please listen to it again.

It’s been cold recently, so please be careful not to catch a cold.

A while ago, Black Cloud, who’re always helping me out, sent me long yams of Nagano. I ate a long yam hot pot with Akane and Sai-chan, and that warmed up my body and heart.

Well, see you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month SAIKI (Dec., 2021)
Translation:
Hello, o-mei-syu-sama. I’m Saiki.

Um, I’d like to choose Mirage for my “Song of the Month”.

It’s getting cold, and I thought Mirage matches perfectly with the season, so I chose it just based on my mood.

Everyone, please kindly listen to it.

Bye-bye.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month AKANE (Dec., 2021)
Translation:
I’m Akane.

December is my birth month!

This year too, you all celebrated my birthday, so I spent it happily.

Masters and princesses, thank you so much for warm messages and images. I’m happy.

For my “Song of the Month”, I’ve chosen About Us with gratitude.

Everyone, thank you always. Thank you for your continued support.

This is the image of the cake when my bandmates celebrated my birthday! Thanks!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month KANAMI (Dec., 2021)
Translation:
How are you?

Time flies and this year is about to end.

Masters and princesses, how will you spend New Year holidays?

Next year, I’d like to do servings in front of you all!

I’d like to go overseas and continue our world domination too.

With that feeling, my “Song of the Month” is DOMINATION!

I wish you masters and princesses that wonderful days will come to you also next year!

That’s all from Kanamincho. Have a happy new year!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MISA (Nov., 2021)
Translation:
Hello, I’m Misa.

My “Song of the Month” is Hide-and-seek.

The other day, I played it for the first time in a while, and that made me feel nostalgic.

I hope I can play it at concerts again someday.

Back when I wrote its bass line, I think I sent it confidently to some of my bandmates, and also to our field manager, like “I’ve written a very good bass line!”

Please someone play it. It’s fun.

This is a picture of slippers I bought recently at Nitori for around 200 yen.

I don’t have many pictures to share.

See you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month KANAMI (Nov., 2021)
Translation:
How are you? I’m Kanamincho.

What do you think is Mincho’s “Song of the Month”?

I’ll give you a hint. I wrote the song while thinking “music is freedom!”

Um, the answer is NO GOD!

I’m really grateful for being allowed to do what I want to do, freely and with fun, in Band-Maid.

This is a picture of a chou à la crème I made for the first time in a long time, around last month.

I love everything sweet!

Well then, see you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month SAIKI (Nov., 2021)
Translation:
Hello, o-mei-syu-sama. I’m Saiki.

Um, I’ve chosen Corallium for my “Song of the Month”.

Um, Corallium is the song I wrote entire lyrics to for the first time. Have you listened to it a lot?

I chose it because I’d like you to listen to it a lot also this month.

I think it matches perfectly with the coming cold winter!

Well then, bye.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  MIKU KOBATO (Nov., 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po.

I’ve chosen Anemone for my “Song of the Month”, po.

It’s the ending song of our regular radio show BAND-MAID NIPPON, po.

During the recordings, I always think “This is a nice song that matches perfectly with the ending!”, po.

Everyone, please look forward to the broadcast, po!

As for this image, when my beloved cat Tora-chan was at home alone, I checked a remote camera like “What is he doing?” and found him looking at me with his glowing eyes, and I was scared, po.

Well then, bye-bye, po!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  AKANE (Nov., 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Hi, I’m Akane.

I often play games with my bandmates in my spare time, and recently I’ve been really into a puzzle game Sai-chan showed me named Machinarium!

And last time, I had a great time playing Mario Tennis with Misa.

I’m looking for games the five of us can play together, so please let me know if you have any recommendations!

Speaking of games, my “Song of the Month” is the battle theme song of the All-Japan e-Sports Competition 2021, Hibana!

Please listen to it!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MISA (Oct., 2021)
Translation:
Hello, I’m Misa.

This time, as for my “Song of the Month”, I asked my bandmates to choose for me, because it’s my birth month.

They have chosen the song with chic bass, The Dragon Cries.

Somehow it already feels nostalgic.

Everyone, please listen to it.

By the way, it’s a photo of a record/multi-player I got recently.

I’m getting into vinyls.

Well then, see you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month KANAMI (Oct., 2021)
Translation:
How are you? I’m Kanamincho.

This month has Misa-chan and Koba-san’s birthdays! That calls for a celebration.

At this moment, it’s really hard for us members to gather and celebrate that, but I hope the day will come again when we can drink together at an izakaya or something and have a great time while getting drunk.

This month, I’ve selected a song I’d like to play if we had a chance to do a serving.

CLANG!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO (Oct., 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po.

When I talked with my bandmates about what to choose for my “Song of the Month”, Sai-chan said to me, “It’s your birth month, so why don’t you choose Sayonakidori?”, so I chose it, po.

I think your birthday is a fantastic day that comes to each of you once every year, so I, Kobato, would like to cherish mine regardless of my age, po.

My bandmates and all of you said to me “Happy birthday!”, so I’m so happy, po!

Well then, bye-bye, po!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month AKANE (Oct., 2021)
Translation:
I’m Akane.

My “Song of the Month” is Sense!

October 7 is the air date of the TV anime Platinum End! And October 27 is the release date of Sense!

That’s why I chose it for October.

Have you seen Platinum End?

I was so moved by the opening sequence that I got goosebumps!

You must be looking forward so much to the broadcast every week.

Please look forward to the full version of Sense too!

That’s all from Akane. Bye-bye!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month SAIKI (Oct., 2021)
Translation:
Hello, o-mei-syu-sama. I’m Saiki.

Um, I’d like to choose Endless Story for my “Song of the Month”.

Um, we will release Sense in October, so I thought of choosing Sense too, but after all I’ve chosen Endless Story.

I thought it would perfectly match the atmosphere of October.

Bye-bye.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO  (Sept. 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po.

Kate was released on Netflix, po, right? Have you seen it yet, po?

We shot our scene around late September in 2019 in Thailand, po.

There were a lot of things we experienced for the first time, and that was so much fun, po!

After shooting in Thailand, we immediately went on a US tour, so it was hard, but I remember we had really fulfilling days, po.

I want to go overseas to do servings there again, po!

So, my “Song of the Month” is Choose me!

Bye-bye, po!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month KANAMI (Sept., 2021)
Translation:
How are you? I’m Kanami.

Um, September is Mincho-chan’s birthday!… birth month.

What do you think I’ll do on my birthday?

Hmm, this year… also this year, surprisingly, I’ll work at home!

You know, we can’t go out now.

I’ll order something delicious and enjoy my birthday at home!

Lastly, as for my “Song of the Month”, I interwove the vibe of my favorite genre or taste in the song.

Bubble!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  AKANE (Sept., 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Hi, I’m Akane.

It rained a lot in September, didn’t it?

The other day, I got caught in a sudden downpour and soaked to the skin on my way home!

Speaking of being soaked, there was an MV we shot in heavy rain, but do you masters and princesses know which song was that?

Yes, the right answer is Warning!

I extremely love the MV, so please watch it a lot.

The Okyu-ji video of Warning! is also awesome, so please watch it too!

Well then, that’s all from Akane.

Bye-bye!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month SAIKI (Sept., 2021)
Translation:
Hello, o-mei-syu-sama. I’m Saiki.

How are you?

Um, as my “Song of the Month”, I’ve chosen Decided by myself.

Um, when the air begins to change like this and I feel the change of seasons, somehow I hear its intro in mind, so I’ve chosen it.

O-mei-syu-sama, please listen to it.

That’s all from Saiki.

Bye-bye.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MISA (Sept., 2021)
Translation:
Hello, I’m Misa.

Everyone, how are you?

I’m fine.

My “Song of the Month” is the refreshing tune PAGE.

I thought fall came, but it’s still a little hot, so it will be nice to enjoy the end of summer.

This song is refreshing and nice no matter when you listen to, in the middle of summer or winter, but somehow I thought it’s nice to listen to it now.

Well, the photo is curry with canned mackerel, eggplants, and tomatoes I made the other day.

See you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MISA (Aug. 2021)
Translation:
Hello, I’m Misa.

The “Song of the Month”, um, what should I choose?…

Um, the number of COVID infections is increasing again, and we are supposed to avoid going out unnecessarily, so I choose this song that would lift you up even in this situation, DICE.

I hope a world where we can have concerts without worry will come soon.

Well, bye-bye.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO  (Aug. 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po.

Kobato’s Song of the Month is Smile, po.

We’re having quite hard time, and I feel lonely…

I remember I wrote the lyrics of Smile by thinking about you masters and princesses, and that reminds me of servings at that time, po!

I want to do servings in front of you all as soon as possible, po.

When we see again, let’s show our big smiles to each other, po!

Bye-bye, po!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  KANAMI (Aug. 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
How are you? I’m Kanamincho!

My “Song of the Month” of August, um, has the word “coffee” that I like.

Now we can’t go out so easily, but when we can again, I’d like to “swim, swim” in the sea.

I can’t swim though, by the way.

I’ve chosen Catharsis for my “Song of the Month”.

Bye-bye!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  AKANE (Aug. 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Hi, I’m Akane.

O-mei-syu-sama, how are you?

My “Song of the Month” is Summer Drive.

Summer reminds me of the song, so I’ve chosen it for August! It makes me feel nostalgic.

Let’s stay healthy even under the broiling sunshine!

Listening to Summer Drive made me want to do a serving at a rock festival.

I hope we can do servings and shout with you all soon.

I’m looking forward to it!

That’s all from Akane.

Bye-bye!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  SAIKI (Aug., 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Hello, o-mei-syu-sama. I’m Saiki.

How are you?

… Well, I’d like to choose One and only for my “Song of the Month”.

Um, that’s because, hmm, I don’t like summer so much, but I like summer evenings, and if the song is played then, I would be uplifted.

Goodbye.

Title: RADIO FOR OMEISYUSAMA③ with English Subs
今月の一曲　Song of the Month SAIKI (July, 2021)
Translation:
Hello, o-mei-syu-sama.

I’d choose Choose me for my “Song of the Month”.

The reason why it’s Choose me is, well, because the cover art is full of green grass and feels like summer.

And the cover was taken in Taiwan.

Bye.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month KANAMI (July, 2021)
Translation:
How are you? I’m Kanamincho.

Now, here’s a pop quiz. What’s Mincho’s choice for the song of July?

I’ll give you a hint. The song was released on July 25, 2018.

Also, when we had a meeting for a next song, we decided to write a song everyone can sing…, and we wrote it.

Does anyone know what song it is?

The correct answer is Start over. Please listen to it.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MISA (July, 2021)
Translation:
Hello, everyone. I’m Misa.

As for my “Song of the Month”, I think the rainy season is going to end soon, the temperature is getting really hot, and cicadas have begun to sing, so I’d choose the summery song Youth.

By the way, the image is takoyaki I was eating a little while ago.

Everyone, do you love takoyaki? I LOVE IT!

We all want to go to summer festivals, right? I want to drink beer.

See you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month AKANE (July, 2021)
Translation:
Hi! I’m Akane, the type who eats only sōmen in summer!

That’s why it’s a photo of Ibonoito!

Well, when I was a kid, there were a lot of fun things in summer, like I had a vacation and I went to the pool and festivals with friends, and I had a sense of freedom, so I chose FREEDOM for my “Song of the Month”!

Everyone, please be careful not to get sick from the heat!

See you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  MIKU (July, 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kuruppo! I’m Kobato, po!

It’s been hot lately, po, right?

And unexpectedly, there’s a sudden heavy rain and thunder. That really surprises me, po.

Everyone, please be careful, po. Life first, po.

At this moment too, thunder is roaring while I’m recording my voice, po.

I’ve chosen a song that would give you a strong heart against heavy rain and thunder as my “Song of the Month”, po!

Screaming!

Title: Super DARADARA Time (Super Lazy Time) from "BAND-MAID ONLINE OKYU-JI (Feb. 11, 2021)"
今月の一曲　Song of the Month KANAMI (June, 2021) English ver.
今月の一曲　Song of the Month SAIKI (June, 2021)
Translation:
Hello, o-mei-syu-sama. I’m Saiki.

Um, for my “Song of the Month”, since it’s June, there’s Father’s Day, so I’d like to choose Big Dad.

It’s a song where Kobato sings lead, but somehow she didn’t choose it… it seems she wasn’t in the mood for it, so I, Sai-chan, chose it for her.

Please listen to it.

Bye-bye.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MISA (June, 2021)
Translation:
I’m Misa.

My “Song of the Month” is Anemone.

It has been raining a lot lately, and one day, the sunset after the rain was so beautiful and it was such a soothing scenery.

At such a moment, I feel like a song plays in myself, which is… Anemone.

All right, well, it’s time to drink.

See you, bye-bye!

Title: BAND-MAID "THE DAY OF MAID (May 10, 2021)" Making Movie
今月の一曲　Song of the Month KANAMI (June, 2021)
Translation:
How are you? I’m Kanamincho.

I introduce my “Song of the Month”!

I think it rains often in June, but since I have made it a habit to drink café au lait on a rainy day, I quite like rainy days.

I think I wrote this song when it was raining, so please listen to it with a cup of café au lait today.

Mirage!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month AKANE (June, 2021)
Translation:
Hi, I’m Akane.

It’s June. It’s the rainy season.

I used to hate going out in the rainy season because it’s too damp. Recently I bought the same rain boots as Kanami’s, so even on a depressing rainy day, once I put on the same rain boots as hers, I get excited and feel sooo fine!

So, my “Song of the Month” is Catharsis, which will make you feel fine!

Let’s get through the rainy season!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO (June, 2021)
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kobato’s “Song of the Month” in June is Matchless GUM, po.

Why is that song, you ask, because this month, June, is my beloved cat Tora’s birthday, po.

Tora is such a baby, and if I don’t play with him, he meows for life, and sometimes, maybe because he feels lonely, he meows in the middle of the night and wakes me up, po.

So, “I can’t sleep at all” like in this song, po (laughs).

He’s too cute to be mad at, po, and just like this song, “You’re all I think of”, po.

See you, po!

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  SAIKI
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Hi, I’m Saiki.

O-mei-syu-sama, how are you?

All right. For my “Song of the Month”, I’d choose Warning!.

The reason is… well, this month, I often decluttered and cleaned up, and the fast-tempo Band-Maid songs helped me do it quickly.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  MISA
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Hi, I’m Misa.

For my “Song of the Month”, I choose Why Why Why.

The reason is that the bass is pretty busy and precise up to the middle, but the chorus is four on the floor and always makes me headbang, which I think is cool.

Do you get it?

I like the feel I get when I reach the chorus after having fun playing the verse.

I love the vocal vibe too.

Everyone, those of you who can play the bass, please play it.

Well, bye-bye.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  KANAMI
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
How are you? I’m Kanamincho.

My “Song of the Month” is Youth.

This song, um, has a twin vocal feel by Sai-chan and Koba-san, and I hoped you would have a great time with it at a serving, so I was glad to play it at “The Day of Maid” the other day!

I would be happy if you could watch the video again. [Note: during the archive period.]

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  AKANE
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
I’m Akane.

My “Song of the Month” is NO GOD.

My passion for servings and the drums doesn’t fade even after “The Day of Maid”, and I’m like “I want to improve like this by the next serving” and “I can do it better”, so the lines “Enjoyment wins the war / I can choose wherever I go” and “Break down my limits / On to the other side and beyond” in NO GOD really resonate with me now. That’s why I chose NO GOD.

Everyone, please listen to it!

See you.

Title: 今月の一曲　Song of the Month  MIKU
Category: Song of the Month MIKU KOBATO
Translation:
Kuruppo, o-mei-syu-sama!

Well, Kobato’s “Song of the Month” is Mirage, po.

We are entering the rainy season, po.

I don’t like rain, because I’m a pigeon, po, but as for me Kobato, rain reminds me of Mirage, po.

Intense songs that would blow away the rainy season may be nice, but once in a while it’s nice to drink coffee while listening to that song calmly in rain, po!

Bye-bye, po!

Title: MESSAGE FROM MIKU ⑩
Translation:
Kuruppo! O-mei-syu-sama, I’m Kobato, po.

Today’s theme is my behind-the-scenes story of “The Day of Maid”, po.

This time I appeared also as Cluppo in the opening act, po.

To my surprise, when I did Cluppo, my bandmates watched me from the audience side, po. I was happy, po!

But by seeing them, I rather got very nervous, po.

Also, every time I started dancing in the chorus, I threw away the pick I was holding, po.

Did any of you notice that, po?

Well then, po, bye-bye, po!

Title: MESSAGE FROM KANAMI ⑩
Translation:
How are you? I’m Mincho.

Um, here is my behind-the-scenes story of “The Day of Maid”. Well, the four of us on the floor, in FREEDOM, talked about a game where the first one to touch Fukkun, the sound engineer, wins, and I, Mincho, won wonderfully!

I managed to get to Fukkun, the sound engineer, so it was so much fun (laughs).

Personally, um, even though we had a lot of space on the floor to play, the four of us gathered in the end very often, so I couldn’t help laughing.

Please check it on the video!

Title: MESSAGE FROM MISA ⑩
Translation:
Hi, I’m Misa.

Well, here’s my behind-the-scenes story of May 10. In my case, as a behind-the-scenes story of May 10, “The Day of Maid”, nothing particular came to my mind, but if any, I could hardly get into the assassin mode until it started.

Um, I panicked like “I can’t become Misa”, “I want to meet my past self”, but when the first note of the opening music started and I drank a little, I found myself turned on.

I’d forgotten it, but I gradually remembered I usually started like that. Yeah.

I realized again Misa is saved by drinking. Apparently.

Well, bye-bye.

Title: MESSAGE FROM AKANE ⑩
Translation:
I’m Akane.

Here’s my behind-the-scenes story of “The Day of Maid”. On my way to the venue, I found a gacha of Haikyu!!, the anime I’m the most into now, but I couldn’t play it because I had no coins at that moment.

Then, when I got into the venue while feeling disappointed, I met Cluppo-san just before her rehearsal, so I greeted her and told her I couldn’t play the gacha, then she gave me 400 yen like “Go and play the gacha with this, po!”

Cluppo-san, thank you so much!

PEACE & LOVE! (laughs)

I was able to do my best at the concert after that.

Let’s do an Okyu-ji together again!

Title: MESSAGE FROM SAIKI ⑩
Translation:
O-mei-syu-sama, good afternoon, good evening, I’m Saiki.

How are you?

Here’s my behind-the-scenes story of “The Day of Maid”. Kobato… um, Cluppo-san appeared as an opening act for us, and she said “my bandmates all watched me, Sai-chan watched me too” [note: at 0:35:06]… but I… couldn’t watch her.

Sorry.

You did a good job. Everyone was excited.

Title: SAIKI⑥【MAID'S ROOM】
Translation:
00:00 O-mei-syu-sama, I’m Saiki.

00:06 All right, this time too, I’ll introduce sneakers.

00:12 It’s Nike also today.

00:17 I’d like to introduce Nike sneakers.

00:24 The box is pure white.

00:28 The sneakers I introduce this time are a birthday present Ah-chan, Kanami-chan, and Misa-chan gave to me two years… two or three years ago.

00:49 Here they are.

00:55 These are Air Force 1 again.

01:03 I’m not sure about this because it was a while ago, but these Air Force 1 were designed for women, easy for women to wear or something like that, and there were several types.

01:32 There were 5 or 6 types, and these were from my bandmates, but I, Sai-chan, also got a different type of the same series myself, so I’ll show them someday.

01:58 And these are named Nike Air Force 1 Jester, and they are different from the ordinary Air Force 1, like this heel part has a thick sole, and can you see the side mark is shifted like this?

02:24 Like it’s shifted, and like this one on the heel part is shifted down.

02:35 And they are light.

02:37 The weight is light.

02:40 These are really the first Jester sneakers to be released, but they must have been popular.

02:54 There were various colors, and many of you must have seen them.

03:01 There were all-wh… white ones, and also pretty flashy ones, and they are so popular.

03:11 I, Sai-chan, love this cute color I can’t quite describe, neither white nor gray.

03:23 Thanks, my bandmates.

03:26 I wear them while taking care of them.

03:28 All right. They are Air Force 1 made for women, and, you know, Air Force 1 is a legendary icon of streetwear.

03:47 I have the impression that these Air Force 1 have a feminine atmosphere, or a light feel? like using this high-quality leather, and they are graceful.

04:09 Other than the box, a pouch? a drawstring pouch is also included. It’s cute, right?

04:24 That’s all about the sneakers I got from my bandmates.

04:33 Bye-bye.

Title: KANAMI⑤【MAID'S ROOM】
Translation:
00:00 How are you, masters and princesses? I’m Kanami, the guitarist!

00:05 Well, today! Um, last time, I talked about my memories by looking at past pictures, and many of you said it was fun, so this time too, I’d like to look back on memories together by looking at various pictures!

00:29 So, today I dug out some pictures from 2016.

00:33 I’ve forgotten many things, but I’d like to look back at pictures together, and I’d like to look at our… kind of histories? that some of you masters and princesses might hear for the first time like “Oh, I didn’t know that”.

00:54 I’ll open them one by one on my computer!

00:57 The first one is this.

01:00 It’s a picture of us holding tulips, um, when we went abroad for the first time.

01:07 We were invited to an event named Sakura-Con, and that allowed us to go abroad for the first time.

01:17 This is Seattle.

01:20 We went to Seattle, and we also filmed quite a lot of materials of the MV of Before Yesterday there and edited them in Japan, so if you haven’t watched the MV of Before Yesterday, it would be nice to watch it.

01:41 Moreover, in that year, 2016, we made a major-label debut with the first album Brand New MAID!

01:51 Back then, we were saying “This is wonderful!”, but actually I remember I didn’t really feel we made a major-label debut.

02:04 That said, each of us were working toward a major-label debut even before forming Band-Maid, so I’m proud to have made a major-label debut in this band!

02:17 And in that year, we Band-Maid went on the Brand New MAID release tour.

02:25 It was… It was our first time going on a nationwide tour, and we went to so many places.

02:34 We went to, um, around 20 places, from July to October.

02:42 We went to various places and ate various delicious foods there, and I think we really strengthened our bond by going around together in that year.

02:57 And the next picture is crab.

03:01 You might wonder why it’s crab, but there was a reason. Actually, the first country of our world tour was Mexico, and we arrived at the airport to fly to Mexico in the night? in the middle of the night, I think.

03:21 It’s a far country, so we were all excited when we arrived at the airport, and we got fired up like “Here we go!”

03:30 Then, trouble occurred, though I don’t quite remember, maybe double booking? Anyway we couldn’t get on the plane.

03:39 We were like “What? Can’t we fly to Mexico today?” so we decided to eat something delicious for the time being and sleep at a hotel and fly there next day. This is a picture of the memory of eating so much crab (laughs).

03:58 I remember Sai-chan and Kobato in particular kept eating lots and lots of crab, like, how many buckets of crab did they eat? (laughs)

04:10 Next, as you see in this picture, we arrived safely in Mexico!

04:19 Well, um, speaking of Mexico, I thought it’s the most powerful country I’ve ever visited.

04:32 It was really powerful when we went there for the first time as well as when we went there recently, because, um, their voices were loud, and they kept chanting “Band-Maid” outside from more than one hour before the start.

04:53 “What?” Initially we were like “What? What? What happened to them? We haven’t started yet but why?” and we were all nervous, but we found it’s a country where people get excited even before the start.

05:09 In Mexico, foods are really delicious and people are all nice. I love it.

05:18 The next picture is this. In a car.

05:22 Well, in our first world tour, we went around many countries in a single van.

05:33 There was only a van, so we also had to put all our equipment in it, and it had six seats in the back, and the six of us including the manager sat there, grasping the knees, because the floor was full of equipment, and we went around many countries, sitting like that for 8 hours or so (laughs).

06:00 I think it was really rough, but I have so many fun memories maybe because we are good friends, and even now we talk like “At that time Kobato was like this and that”, so, um, even though we had a hard time, we had a lot of fun in the end. This picture of the van reminds me of that.

06:33 It was our first world tour, and we were all moved to find there were masters and princesses in the first place, like “This many people know about us overseas!”

06:46 Moreover, there were so many people working hard to learn Japanese that I got teary-eyed.

06:55 It’s still the same, but I’m feeling you masters and princesses are getting better and better at Japanese year by year.

07:07 I would be happy if we could make you love Japanese culture, the Japanese language, and Japan itself through us Band-Maid.

07:23 The next is a picture of the serving at Shimokitazawa Garden.

07:30 Well, we went on the world tour, um, at Mexico, London, Cologne, Hamburg, Paris, Warsaw? and returned to Japan once, in order to do this serving at Shimokitazawa.

07:48 Well, we went on the nationwide tour, um, in Japan, and after finishing it, we went on the overseas tour World Series, and then we got a chance to do an additional performance and we were asked when to do, and our schedule only allowed that day, so we returned to Japan once and did the serving at Garden at went back on the overseas tour. I remember it was a sche… such a tight and hard schedule.

08:22 Howerver, I’m really grateful of being able to do an additional performance.

08:28 Since we got the tickets sold out, we wanted to do it for masters and princesses who couldn’t come to see us, and we realized the number of our masters and princesses increased quite a lot in 2016.

08:53 In the beginning, there was literally only one person or a few people who came to see us, so we were absolutely happy, we were glad we were able to do an additional performance.

09:13 The next picture is when we did a serving at Hong Kong.

09:18 After finishing the additional serving, I mean, after finishing the serving of the additional performance, we flew to Hong Kong within a week and did a serving there.

09:32 We went to Hong Kong for the first time, so we were all nervous, wondering what kind of country it is, but it was like Japan, I mean, it was similar to Japan.

09:46 Foods there, um, are very, um, suit Japanese people’s tastes so much.

09:55 There were a lot of delicious foods.

09:57 At the serving too, I think they got excited in the way Japanese people do.

10:06 We managed to finish the world tour and the nationwide tour like that.

10:13 The next picture is when we appeared in Classic Rock Awards 2016. It brings back memories!

10:22 It was an event literally many legends appeared in, so I thought it was an overwhelming honor for us Band-Maid to appear in it (laughs).

10:36 I was absolutely nervous.

10:38 Well, it was an absolutely inspiring day.

10:44 I couldn’t take my eyes off at any moment on that day.

10:48 We’d like to do our best to appear with such legends again someday!

10:50 The next is a picture when we released YOLO.

11:05 Well, we were making the rounds of stores such as Tower Records.

11:11 We make the rounds of stores also now. We were all really glad about the single release, I mean, our major-label debut single release. I was happy!

11:25 You know, we also make the rounds of promotional displays, and they are so kind to us at any stores.

11:39 Thank you so much all the time (laughs).

11:41 Now, this is the last picture! The last one this time.

11:45 Um, in this picture, uh, my hair is messy, and this is when I purchased a PRS for the first time.

11:56 Well, it was the moment when I changed to PRS, thinking about the direction of Band-Maid, and, um, thinking which sound would be good for us.

12:16 So, I tried various guitars, at instrument shops and the like, and PRS fit me the best.

12:27 I had a kind of intuition that it would be the Band-Maid sound (laughs).

12:35 I had such an intuition, and I was also attracted so much to the material of PRS that seems to stick to my hand, so I decided to use PRS in Band-Maid, and tried a lot of guitars, and finally got this purple guitar.

12:58 I have quite a long relationship with this guitar.

13:01 So, this time, I looked back on Band-Maid in 2016!

13:08 While looking at the pictures, I felt somewhat nostalgic, but I also felt it was recent.

13:19 Everyone, did you enjoy it?

13:23 I would be glad if you enjoyed it (laughs).

13:28 Well, there must be many of you masters and princesses who got to know about us Band-Maid recently. We have been working hard on lots and lots of things with fun like that.

13:45 Now, um, that’s all for Mincho’s Room today.

13:50 Thank you so much for watching!

Title: AKANE⑤【MAID'S ROOM】
Translation:
00:00 Akane: Hi, I’m Akane.

00:03 Akane: Today, I’m recording this video at a special guest’s house!

00:10 Akane: Now, please welcome today’s special guest!

00:16 Akane: Please come in, Love-Love-Alcohol-Woman-san! (laughs)

00:22 Misa: I’m Love-Love-Alcohol-Woman. [Note: intended to sound like a superhero’s name.]

00:26 Akane: This is Love-Love-Alcohol-Woman-san (laughs)

00:30 Akane: All right.

00:31 Misa: What are we going to make? Oops, sorry, I said “make”.

00:32 Akane: Hey, no spoilers (laughs).

00:36 Akane: This year we couldn’t eat at food carts, so why don’t you do it yourself? (laughs)

00:44 Akane: That’s why.

00:45 Akane: Then I found something nice!

00:48 Akane: This is it!!

00:52 Akane: Can you see this? This is “Tanoshii Omatsuriyasan”, a food cart at a festival.

00:58 Misa: Is it something for kids?

01:01 Akane: Yeah, it’s a DIY candy kit.

01:02 Akane: We’d like to pretend to be food cart cooks at a festival!

01:07 Akane: Yay!

01:09 Akane: Now we will cook! [Note: she imitates the way of talking of Kimagure Cook, a popular cooking YouTuber.]

01:11 Misa: All right, first, “Let’s cut the tray along the 3 lines!”

01:15 Akane: I’m really not good at this.

01:18 Akane: I’m sloppy. Because I’m not detail-oriented.

01:21 Akane: I’m very poor at this.

01:25 Akane: It fell (laughs).

01:27 Misa: Hey!

01:28 Akane: Sorry (laughs).

01:30 Misa: Really!

01:32 Akane: Sorry!

01:35 Misa: Second. “Let’s make candy apples!”

01:37 Akane: Yaaay! (laughs)

01:40 [Caption] Now making candy apples

01:47 Akane: I made it!

01:48 Akane: Candy apples are ready to serve!

01:49 Misa: Third, “Let’s make French fries!”
